message:
feat: add zerobuf/slots low-level helpers + arena.reset()

- slots.ts: raw DataView slot readers/writers (writeStringSlot, readStringSlot,
  writeI32Slot, readI32Slot, writeF64Slot, writeBytesSlot, etc.) for working
  directly with WASM memory without an Arena
- Exported as both "zerobuf/slots" subpath and from main "zerobuf" entry
- arena.reset(): rewinds to startOffset, cheaper than recreating Memory+Arena
- 9 new tests (79 total)
